languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

languages.text: "Не буду скрывать — ксенос, с которым мы имеем дело, не в первый раз появляется в летописях Инквизиции. Это опасный противник. Боюсь, мы даже не способны полноценно оценить, насколько именно опасный".
"I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."
languages.original_text: "Не буду скрывать — ксенос, с которым мы имеем дело, не в первый раз появляется в летописях Инквизиции. Это опасный противник. Боюсь, мы даже не способны полноценно оценить, насколько именно опасный".

traits.locale_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."
"I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."
"I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

languages.text: 「私は事実を隠さない。この異形は過去にインキジシオンの記録に現れている。彼は危険な敵だ。彼の危険度を完全に把握することは恐らくできないだろう」
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: 「私は事実を隠さない。この異形は過去にインキジシオンの記録に現れている。彼は危険な敵だ。彼の危険度を完全に把握することは恐らくできないだろう。」

languages.text: « Je vais être franc : le xénos en question a déjà été mentionné dans les annales de l'Inquisition. C'est un adversaire redoutable. J'ai bien peur que nous ne puissions même pas déterminer à quel point il est dangereux. »
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais être franc : le xénos en question a déjà été mentionné dans les annales de l'Inquisition. C'est un adversaire redoutable. J'ai bien peur que nous ne puissions même pas déterminer à quel point il est dangereux. »

languages.text: "Ich werde die Fakten nicht verschweigen ... der fragliche Xenos ist in den Annalen der Inquisition schon einmal aufgetreten. Er ist ein gefährlicher Gegner. Ich fürchte, wir können nicht einmal ermessen, wie gefährlich er ist."
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde die Fakten nicht verschweigen ... der fragliche Xenos ist in den Annalen der Inquisition schon einmal aufgetreten. Er ist ein gefährlicher Gegner. Ich fürchte, wir können nicht einmal ermessen, wie gefährlich er ist."

languages.text: "Gerçekleri saklamayacağım... Söz konusu zeno, daha önce Engizisyon'un yıllıklarında yer almıştı. Tehlikeli bir rakip. Korkarım ne kadar tehlikeli olduğunu tam olarak belirleyemiyoruz bile."
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekleri saklamayacağım... Söz konusu zeno, daha önce Engizisyon'un yıllıklarında yer almıştı. Tehlikeli bir rakip. Korkarım ne kadar tehlikeli olduğunu tam olarak belirleyemiyoruz bile."

languages.text: «No ocultaré el hecho de que ese xenos en concreto ya había aparecido previamente en los anales de la Inquisición. Es un adversario peligroso, y me temo que ni siquiera somos conscientes aún de su peligro».
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: «No ocultaré el hecho de que ese xenos en concreto ya había aparecido previamente en los anales de la Inquisición. Es un adversario peligroso, y me temo que ni siquiera somos conscientes aún de su peligro».

languages.text: “我不会隐瞒事实——那个异形早已在审判庭的档案中留下记载。他极端危险，甚至我们都难以真正衡量其威胁。”
languages.original_text: "I will not hide the facts — the xenos in question has previously appeared in the annals of the Inquisition. He is a dangerous opponent. I fear we cannot even fully determine quite how dangerous."

traits.locale_text: “我不会隐瞒事实——那个异形早已在审判庭的档案中留下记载。他极端危险，甚至我们都难以真正衡量其威胁。”
